skill-python.title: Python: Programming Language
skill-python.subtitle: Data Science and Machine Learning
skill-python.description: I use Python to build data pipelines, develop machine learning models, and automate data-driven processes.

skill-cpp.title: C++: Programming Language
skill-cpp.subtitle: High Performance and Interoperability
skill-cpp.description: I use C++ to develop high-performance libraries and APIs, especially when optimizing algorithms and enabling interoperability with other languages like Python. Ideal for computationally intensive tasks and low-level system design.

skill-tensorflow.title: TensorFlow: Deep Learning Framework
skill-tensorflow.subtitle: Neural Network Modeling
skill-tensorflow.description: I use TensorFlow to build and train deep learning models. It supports tasks like time series forecasting, data generation, and AI experimentation through sequential and generative architectures.

skill-html5.title: HTML5: Markup Language
skill-html5.subtitle: Page Structure and Content
skill-html5.description: I use HTML5 to define the structure of web pages, organizing content through semantic elements. It serves as the foundation for integrating design and interactivity in web-based applications.

skill-css3.title: CSS3: Style Sheet Language
skill-css3.subtitle: Design and Layout for the Web
skill-css3.description: CSS3 allows me to style and layout web pages with custom design, responsiveness, and visual consistency. I use it to ensure that web interfaces are both functional and aesthetically clear.

skill-javascript.title: Javascript: Programming Language
skill-javascript.subtitle: Dynamic Behavior and Frontend Logic
skill-javascript.description: I use JavaScript to add interactivity to web pages, trigger events, and display analysis results dynamically. It complements HTML and CSS in frontend workflows, especially in building data-driven visual interfaces.

skill-git.title: Git: Version Control System
skill-git.subtitle: Code Management and Collaboration
skill-git.description: I use Git to track changes, manage branches, and collaborate on code efficiently. Most of my projects are versioned and maintained through Git, often integrated with GitHub for remote repository hosting and CI/CD workflows.

skill-docker.title: Docker: Containerization Platform
skill-docker.subtitle: Environment Automation and Portability
skill-docker.description: I use Docker to containerize applications and ensure consistent environments across development and production. With Docker Compose, I orchestrate multi-container setups for projects involving databases, APIs, and data pipelines.

skill-mysql.title: MySQL: Relational Database
skill-mysql.subtitle: Ideal for Web and Lightweight Applications
skill-mysql.description: I use MySQL to design and manage relational databases, especially in projects with frontend integration. It’s effective for creating normalized schemas using tools like MySQL Workbench and suits small to medium-scale applications.

skill-postgresql.title: PostgreSQL: Relational Database
skill-postgresql.subtitle: Enterprise-Grade Data Management
skill-postgresql.description: PostgreSQL is my go-to choice for scalable and robust database solutions. I use it in production-ready environments, often in Docker-based setups, due to its reliability, advanced features, and strong SQL compliance.

skill-influxdb.title: InfluxDB: Time Series Database
skill-influxdb.subtitle: Real-Time Data Monitoring
skill-influxdb.description: I use InfluxDB to store and query time series data efficiently, especially for system and application monitoring. It’s a NoSQL database optimized for time-stamped data and integrates well with tools like Grafana.

skill-bash.title: Bash: Build Automation Tool
skill-bash.subtitle: Automates Compilation and Workflow Tasks
skill-bash.description: I use Makefile to automate the build process, manage dependencies, compile C/C++ projects, and run tasks like testing or integration with other tools. It's essential for reproducible and efficient workflows.

skill-grafana.title: Grafana: Data Visualization Platform
skill-grafana.subtitle: Observability and AI Monitoring
skill-grafana.description: Grafana is my main tool for creating interactive dashboards to visualize time series, system metrics, and AI results. I use it in MLOps pipelines to track model performance and infrastructure behavior in real time.
